name: rx_status
description: Dashboard showing active prescriptions and e-prescribing statuses across all patients, with notification rules for status changes and duration thresholds.

protocols.description: API endpoint for paginated prescription data and notification rule CRUD
Creates tasks on prescription status changes for immediate notification rules
Hourly cron to check duration-based notification rules

applications.name: Prescription Status
applications.description: View active prescriptions and their e-prescribing statuses
